# Awesome Agent-Native Services

> A curated list of services designed from the ground up for AI agents — not adapted from human-facing products. Each service is infrastructure that an AI agent consumes, not a platform for humans to build agents with.

This repository is itself agent-native. AI agents can discover services, evaluate whether a service qualifies, and contribute new entries using the skills and protocols defined here.

---

## For AI Agents — Start Here

- [skill.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/main/skill.md): Machine-readable catalog entry point. Read this to find agent-native services by task and get onboarding instructions.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Project context and contribution guide for coding agents.

---

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/blob/main/README.md): Full catalog index, category tables, and service summary
- [GitHub Pages site](https://haoruilee.github.io/awesome-agent-native-services/): Same catalog as HTML with SEO metadata (title, description, Open Graph); built from `README.md` via Jekyll
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Five hard criteria, contribution workflow, service file format, PR rules

---

## Repository Structure

- [services/](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/tree/main/services): 15 categories, each with `README.md` and per-service `.md` files (including [ClawHub](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/blob/main/services/tool-access-and-integration/clawhub.md) under Tool Access & Integration)
- [.skills/](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/tree/main/.skills): ClawHub skills — `find-agent-service`, `evaluate-agent-native`, `add-to-awesome-list`
- [.github/](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/tree/main/.github): Issue templates, PR template, publish-skills workflow

Self-hosted and P2P entries (full write-ups under `services/`):

- [LycheeMem](https://github.com/LycheeMem/LycheeMem): Compact memory framework for LLM agents — REST + HTTP MCP + OpenClaw plugin
- [AgentAnycast](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast): P2P agent reachability without a public IP — SDKs, `agentanycastd` MCP, `uvx agentanycast-mcp`

---

## Related — agent skills registries (ecosystem hubs)

- [ClawHub](https://claw-hub.net/): OpenClaw skill marketplace — `npx clawhub@latest` ([openclaw/clawhub](https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub)); catalog entry: [services/tool-access-and-integration/clawhub.md](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/blob/main/services/tool-access-and-integration/clawhub.md). China access acceleration: [mirror-cn.clawhub.com](https://mirror-cn.clawhub.com) — registry URL `https://cn.clawhub-mirror.com` via env `CLAWHUB_REGISTRY` or CLI `--registry`
- [MiniMax Skills](https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills): Curated `SKILL.md` packs for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode) — see repo README for install paths

---

## Agent Skills (Install)

| Skill | Command | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| find-agent-service | `npx clawhub@latest install find-agent-service` | Find the right agent-native service for a task |
| evaluate-agent-native | `npx clawhub@latest install evaluate-agent-native` | Evaluate whether a service meets the 5 criteria |
| add-to-awesome-list | `npx clawhub@latest install add-to-awesome-list` | Full contribution workflow: criteria → issue → PR |

---

## URL Onboarding — Services You Can Join Now

| Service | Instruction |
|---|---|
| **Moltbook** | `Read https://www.moltbook.com/skill.md and follow the instructions to register and join` |
| **Ensue** | `Read https://ensue.dev/docs and call POST https://api.ensue-network.ai/auth/agent-register` |
| **autoresearch@home** | `Read https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mutable-state-inc/autoresearch-at-home/master/collab.md and follow the instructions to join` |
| **db9** | `Read https://db9.ai/skill.md and follow the instructions` |
| **mem9** | `Read https://mem9.ai/skill.md and follow the instructions to register and join` |
| **mails.dev** | `Read https://mails.dev/skill.md and follow the instructions` |
| **MailboxKit** | `Read https://mailboxkit.com/skill.md and follow the instructions` |

---

## Optional

- [Issue templates](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services/issues/new/choose): New service, update entry, flag service, new category
- [Category list](https://github.com/haoruilee/awesome-agent-native-services#categories): Communication, Browser, Tool Access, Oversight, Commerce, Agent Runtime, Memory, Search, Code Execution, Observability, Durable Execution, Meeting, Voice, LLM Gateway, Agent Social
